data.title: Vertiv Holdings Co (VRT) surpassed Q3 expectations with 29% Y/Y sales growth to $2.68B. Raised fiscal 2025 adjusted EPS to $4.07–$4.13 and sales outlook to $10.16B–$10.24B. For Q4, adjusted EPS of $1.23–$1.29 expected.
data.description: Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE: VRT) exceeded expectations in their third-quarter fiscal 2025 report. They reported a 29% increase in net sales Y/Y, reaching $2.68 billion, surpassing the estimated $2.56 billion. Their adjusted EPS was $1.24, also beating estimates of $0.99. The company raised its fiscal 2025 adjusted EPS guidance to $4.07–$4.13, up from $3.75–$3.85, surpassing the consensus of $3.81. Furthermore, they increased their 2025 sales forecast to $10.16 billion–$10.24 billion, higher than the previous range of $9.93 billion–$10.08 billion and the estimated $10.04 billion. For the fourth quarter, Vertiv anticipates an adjusted EPS of $1.23–$1.29.

data.title: Zoomd and E2 have signed a partnership to boost Zoomd's presence in sports betting. (Total words: 16)
data.description: In Toronto on October 23, 2025, Zoomd Technologies Ltd. (TSXV: ZOMD) (OTC: ZMDTF) and its subsidiary Zoomd Ltd. revealed that they have entered into a new venture. Zoomd, a prominent marketing technology company, specializes in user acquisition and engagement through their MarTech platform.

data.title: Antelope Surgical Solutions to present at 2025 Mid-Atlantic Capital Conference, showcasing fluorescence-guided oncology platform.
data.description: Antelope Surgical Solutions, an innovative theranostics biotechnology company, showcased its fluorescence-guided oncology platform in New York on Oct. 23, 2025. The platform is the first of its kind in the world, utilizing a fluorescent radioligand to aid in cancer detection and treatment. The company's presentation comes as investor and strategic interest in the technology continues to rise. This clinical-stage company is gaining attention for its cutting-edge approach to oncology, with potential applications in various medical fields.

data.title: Saudi Arabia pet food market valued at $74.56 million in 2024, expected to reach $82.56 million by 2030 with 1.71% CAGR due to rising pet ownership.
data.description: The report "Saudi Arabia Pet Food Market, By Region, Competition, Forecast & Opportunities, 2020-2030F" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Saudi Arabia Pet Food Market reached a value of USD 74.56 Million in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 82.56 Million by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 1.71%. The market in Saudi Arabia is seeing consistent expansion, fueled by various factors such as a rise in pet ownership, notably among younger age groups.

data.title: Valero's Q3 2025 earnings report beats estimates, with revenue at $32.2B, adjusted earnings of $3.66/share. Refining segment key to $1.6B operating income.
data.description: Valero Energy Corp.'s stock (NYSE: VLO) experienced a surge following the release of their third-quarter fiscal 2025 earnings report, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported quarterly revenue of $32.2 billion, exceeding the anticipated $29.9 billion. Furthermore, adjusted earnings per share stood at $3.66, surpassing the estimated $3.05 per share by Wall Street. Valero closed the quarter with $4.8 billion in cash and cash equivalents and carried total debt amounting to $8.4 billion. In terms of segment performance, the Refining sector emerged as the primary contributor to operating income, generating $1.6 billion.

data.title: Tesla stock is down post third-quarter results. Revenue at $28.10B, missing EPS target at 50 cents per share. 497,099 vehicles delivered.
data.description: Tesla Inc (TSLA) shares are trading down following the release of its third-quarter results. The company reported revenue of $28.10 billion, surpassing analyst expectations of $26.24 billion. However, adjusted earnings of 50 cents per share fell short of the estimated 54 cents per share. Total revenue saw a 12% year-over-year increase, with automotive revenue up 6% to $21.2 billion. Tesla manufactured 447,450 vehicles in Q3 and delivered 497,099. The company is experiencing pressure from bearish momentum post-earnings release. Read more on the complete story and analysis.

data.title: Brooklyn Chop House to open in Miami on Nov 11, 2025, combining steakhouse dining and Asian cuisine in Wynwood.
data.description: Reservations are now open for the grand opening of Brooklyn Chop House in Miami's Wynwood neighborhood on November 11th, 2025. Known for its unique blend of traditional steakhouse fare and innovative Asian dishes, the renowned New York restaurant is set to open its new location on the seventh floor. Make sure to secure your spot for this highly anticipated dining experience.

data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on October 23, 2025, it was announced that Aker ASA is set to release its financial performance data for the third quarter of 2025 on November 4, 2025, at 07:00 CET. Following this, an online presentation showcasing the results will be accessible via webcast on the same day at 09:00 CET. Specifics regarding the webcast are as follows: Date – Tuesday,...

data.title: Uniform introduces AI to prevent lengthy platform migrations, allowing brands to quickly create digital experiences on any website.
data.description: A new advancement in AI technology has been revealed by Uniform, a prominent player in digital experience management. This innovation allows brands to swiftly generate, enhance, and deliver digital experiences in a matter of minutes, all without the need to modify their existing technology stack. The unveiling took place in San Francisco on October 23, 2025. This development presents an opportunity for companies to streamline their digital processes efficiently.

data.title: TrueBloom launches to support independent fertility clinics, promoting sustainable growth. aims to unify care with an integrated platform.
data.description: TrueBloom, a network in Nashville, Tennessee, focused on providing cost-effective and outcomes-based care for women and families undergoing fertility treatments, has unveiled a new integrated platform. The platform aims to bring together providers, pharmacies, and clinical services to deliver cohesive care. TrueBloom's goal is to streamline care for families by connecting various specialized providers to offer support during the challenging fertility journey. This initiative will benefit independent providers and improve the support available to families undergoing fertility treatments.

data.title: First Fertility will showcase its innovative fertility care approach at ASRM 2025, highlighting their network of experts.
data.description: First Fertility is set to showcase its network of fertility specialists at the 2025 ASRM Scientific Congress & Expo in Rocky Hill, Connecticut. This event will provide an opportunity for the company to highlight its expertise and services to a wide audience.

data.title: Crexendo and NUSO join forces to provide global cloud communications, allowing service providers to reach customers worldwide.
data.description: In Phoenix, NUSO and Crexendo have joined forces to provide worldwide cloud communications services. This partnership allows service providers to accompany their customers wherever they may go.

data.title: eClinicalWorks teams up with Sunoh.ai to assist 75-provider FQHC in Florida, reducing burnout and improving care.
data.description: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks, the leading ambulatory cloud EHR provider, has revealed the completion of the integration of Sunoh.ai, an AI medical scribe that works across various Suncoast Community Health Centers sites in Florida. This EHR-agnostic AI medical transcription tool is seamlessly linked with the eClinicalWorks EHR system and operates discreetly during patient consultations. Its implementation has shown marked improvements in patient care efficiency and has helped decrease provider burnout. Sunoh.ai also boasts multilingual capabilities, enhancing its usability.

data.title: Nauta hires Patrick Cox as Head of Global Sales to drive US expansion, focusing on food and beverage. Customers in this segment have grown by over 7x.
data.description: Nauta, the AI-based supply chain performance solution, has welcomed Patrick Cox as the new Head of Global Sales in New York. Cox's role will involve spearheading commercial expansion and strategic initiatives for Nauta, aiming to increase platform utilization among corporate shippers in industries like food and beverage, consumer goods, and manufacturing. His appointment comes at a crucial juncture for Nauta as the company seeks to broaden its clientele, particularly in the food and beverage sector. Notably, Nauta has experienced a significant surge in customers in this sector, with a growth rate surpassing sevenfold.

data.title: Saudi Arabia High-performance Trucks Market worth $0.88 billion in 2024, forecasted to reach $1.17 billion by 2030 with a 5.02% CAGR. Competitive analysis included.
data.description: A report titled "Saudi Arabia High-Performance Trucks Market, By Region, Competition, Forecast & Opportunities, 2020-2030F" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market for high-performance trucks in Saudi Arabia was worth USD 0.88 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 1.17 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.02%. The high-performance trucks market in Saudi Arabia is experiencing significant changes due to the growth in industrial activities and expanding opportunities.

data.title: Analysts cut forecasts on Lennox International after Q3 earnings; EPS $6.98, missing sales to $1.426B, lowered FY2025 guidance.
data.description: Lennox International Inc (NYSE: LII) announced strong third-quarter earnings results but revised its full-year 2025 outlook on Wednesday. The company reported earnings of $6.98 per share for the quarter, surpassing the analyst consensus of $6.86 per share. However, quarterly sales were reported at $1.426 billion, falling short of the expected $1.490 billion. Lennox adjusted its full-year 2025 EPS guidance from $23.25-$24.25 to $22.75-$23.25 and anticipates a 1% decrease in revenue. The company attributes these adjustments to the refrigerant transition impact and challenging macroeconomic conditions in 2025. The Lennox team is responding with flexibility and focus amidst this uncertain period. Find the complete article on Benzinga.com.
